title: askalf/dario
summary: Local LLM router. One endpoint for Claude Max/Pro, OpenAI, OpenRouter, Groq, Ollama, LiteLLM, any OpenAI-compat URL — your tools don't need to change. OAuth for Claude subscriptions, multi-account pool, MCP server. Zero runtime deps.

title: AashishH15/MindVault
summary: A knowledge management platform which acts as a persistent, structured, and token-efficient memory layer for large language models

title: strikersam/local-llm-server
summary: Self-hosted local LLM server & AI control plane — OpenAI-compatible proxy for Ollama, multi-agent orchestration, unified dashboard, and zero API bills.

title: gabriele-mastrapasqua/linklore
summary: Bookmarks you actually own — local-first link manager with hybrid search (FTS5 + semantic), private RAG chat with citations, and an LLM-optional pipeline. One Go binary, one SQLite file. No accounts, no SaaS, no telemetry.

title: chieaid24/IoT-Energy-Tracker
summary: A microservice-centered backend aggregating energy usage for a user's home devices, automating alerts and generating AI-powered personalized insights. Streams device usage through Kafka, stores time-series data in InfluxDB, persists users/devices in MySQL, triggers alert emails, and generates insights via Ollama (gemma3).

title: ctala/ai-benchmarks-alternativos
summary: Benchmark abierto de 44 modelos LLM con 5,000+ tests reales. Alternativas a Claude, GPT-5 y Gemini para agentes N8N, OpenClaw y emprendedores. Calculadora interactiva + LLM-as-Judge Phi-4.

title: markmiddo/synthia
summary: AI-powered voice assistant that respects your privacy. Control your desktop, dictate text, and remotely manage Claude Code - all running locally on your machine.

title: PrimeEcto/gemma-chat-windows
summary: Local-first Electron coding agent powered by Gemma 4, with MLX on Apple Silicon and Ollama on Windows/Linux for offline chat, code generation, and live preview.

title: dyad-sh/dyad
summary: Local, open-source AI app builder for power users ✨ v0 / Lovable / Replit / Bolt alternative 🌟 Star if you like it!

title: Alex8791-cyber/cognithor
summary: Cognithor · Agent OS: Local-first autonomous agent operating system. 19 LLM providers, 18 channels, 145 MCP tools, 6-tier memory, Agent Packs marketplace, zero telemetry. Python 3.12+, Apache 2.0.

title: briandenicola/coin-collection-app
summary: A simple application to track one's coin collection

title: Oolab-labs/patchwork-os
summary: MCP bridge between Claude Code and your IDE (170+ tools — LSP, debugger, terminal, git). Optional Patchwork OS layer adds recipes, approval queue, and oversight dashboard.

title: SachinVenugopalan30/shell-ai
summary: Translate natural language to shell commands

title: Th3rdai/CodeCompanion
summary: Th3rdAI Code Companion — helps vibe coders understand, review, and improve AI-generated code using local Ollama LLMs

title: SlasshyOverhere/SlasshyWispr
summary: Desktop voice dictation + AI assistant with online, offline, and hybrid runtimes. Speak, transcribe, rewrite, and respond fast with local Parakeet STT and Ollama support.

title: genuscortinariusmors282/LLM-wiki
summary: Maintain a centralized knowledge wiki for LLMs by compiling raw documentation into actionable, versioned markdown files.

title: asdadcfgh-maker/dxa-deimos
summary: Build terminal-native coding agents with multi-model routing, MCP support, and built-in tool orchestration for deep development workflows.

title: Leptospirasheepcote429/ScreenBrain
summary: Search, organize, and find screenshots on macOS with AI vision and OCR, all offline and privacy-first

summary: Provide a LangGraph medical assistant for Q&A, web retrieval, and image analysis with human review for high-risk outputs
